summary: Code quality is solid: workflow uses pinned actions (v4), least-privilege perms (contents:read), proper outputs/env fallbacks. Script has strong type hints, docstrings, pure functions, consistent error handling (FileNotFoundError, ValueError). But deliverable is critically incomplete: workflow references fixtures/ directory (lines 49-51) containing package.json and commits.txt that don't exist. Line 50 `test -d "${FIX_DIR}"` will fail immediately. Required act-result.txt proof-of-execution file is absent. Fixtures are data dependencies (not test code) that the workflow cannot function without—without them, the pipeline cannot run at all. Task requires fixture creation and act validation proof; neither present.
